title: Molten Light Tunisian Pears Tagine
description: A light and savory Tunisian-inspired dish featuring poached pears in a rich and aromatic molten sauce.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly caramelized.
Add the minced garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and cayenne; cook for 1 minute.
Add the vegetable broth, honey, and lemon juice; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 10-15 minutes.
Meanwhile, peel and halve the pears and poach in a separate saucepan of simmering water until tender.
Remove the pears from the water with a slotted spoon and add to the saucepan with the molten sauce.
Simmer, uncovered, for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the pears are coated in the sauce.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
Let cool to room temperature before refrigerating or freezing.
